raw_consumer_statement: A credit card that is registered with ( XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  ) XXXX  XXXX was used without my permission in a case of Identity thief at the XXXX XXXX on XXXX XXXX XXXX in XXXX, MA XXXX. In the XXXX XXXX store items amounting to {$370.00} and at the XXXX XXXX for {$840.00} were purchased by an identity thief on XX/XX/year> according to the XXXX XXXX  XXXX  Billing Statement. I am currently watching my credit and any credit that might be in my name because I am a victim of Identity theft in other situations. And these fraudulent purchases made at these two store in the XXXX XXXX are causing me more pain, suffering, missing work and challenging false charges on my credit. I am still receiving bills for this fraudulent activity after I filed a Police Report with the XXXX XXXX  and the report number is # XXXX on XX/XX/year>.
